user.title: Dimplex Hub
user.description: Open this URL to sign in and trigger auth requests: {auth_url}. In your browser DevTools, open Network and enable Preserve log before you submit the sign-in request. Then copy the full msal redirect URL (or just the code parameter) from the captured request and paste it below.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Dimplex Hub
reauth_confirm.description: Your Dimplex Hub authentication has expired. Open this URL to sign in again: {auth_url}. Then copy the full msal redirect URL (or just the code parameter) and paste it below.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Dimplex service.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance is allowed.
